pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J. It's a bit of a crowd in here, isn't it? What's your name, and are you feeling as nervous about this game as I am?
Hey J, I'm E. It’s definitely a tight squeeze in here. I wouldn't say I'm nervous, just really focused—I've got a lot riding on this game. You?
I get that. I'm pretty determined too—I've got people at home counting on me. What would you do with the win?
Same here, it's for the people I care about—making sure they're taken care of and finally getting some stability. What about you, any specific plans?
Mostly just clearing some family debts and putting away a safety net so we don't have to stress every month. It’s all about that peace of mind.
I hear that. Peace of mind is everything, especially when it comes to family. It sounds like we’re both here for the same reasons.
It really does. It’s good to find some common ground here. Since we're both in it for our families, do you think we should look out for each other?
I'm in. It’s definitely better to have an ally you can trust when there's this much on the line.
Glad we're on the same page. Let's keep an eye out for each other then—strength in numbers, right?
Exactly. I've got your back. Let's stay focused and make this happen.
Sounds like a plan. Let's do this for our families. See you out there.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I couldn't agree more. It's rare to see everyone align so perfectly, and it worked out well for everyone involved.
